jiraResponses.summary: Conversions to Update Names and Descriptions of Obsolete Purgeable Data Types

latestComment.author: Sarah Grandhomme
latestComment.body: The base value does not reflect the instance name for the updated Purgeable Data Types. But this is not something we can solve at translation level?
latestComment.tldr: Translation team found base values do not match updated instance names; Shiho is now assigned and coordinating the review

jiraResponses.tldrSummary: Shiho Yamagishi apologised for delayed triage and is coordinating the translation team to review (Do Not Use) label changes for obsolete Purgeable Data Types created by David's purge conversion

jiraResponses.summary: Purged Job Application intermittently gets an unassigned task with Disposition Job Applications Before Purge tenant parameter enabled

latestComment.author: David Denham
latestComment.body: Updated targeted dates for Preview and Prod on HRREC-88145. Current target is May 22nd for Preview.
latestComment.tldr: David responded with updated target dates - May 22nd Preview, then 3 weeks before Prod

jiraResponses.tldrSummary: Samsung (160K candidates), Hitachi, and ReSource Pro added to Airbus/NatWest/Stora Enso. Rainie Chou raised priority and asked about delivery dates. David responded with May 22nd Preview target.

competitorNews.title: iCIMS Launches Frontline AI and Spring 2026 Platform Expansion
bullets: iCIMS Frontline AI is a purpose-built hiring solution for high-volume frontline talent, featuring 24/7 AI-led conversational experiences across SMS, WhatsApp, and web
Mobile-first application and interview scheduling flow targets the 91% of frontline hiring managers who report urgent role-filling needs
Spring 2026 release adds greater automation, enhanced configurability, and measurable sourcing insights across the platform
Addresses the challenge that more than half of candidates abandon applications before completion in frontline scenarios
competitorNews.workdayImplication: iCIMS Frontline AI with WhatsApp/SMS mirrors our India messaging play; watch for enterprise overlap in high-volume verticals

competitorNews.title: Greenhouse Launches New Tools to Tame Chaotic Hiring Funnels
bullets: New tools designed to reduce chaos in hiring funnels with better pipeline visibility and control
Targets mid-market and enterprise segments with structured hiring workflows
Continues Greenhouse push into enterprise segment, historically Workday's stronghold
Positions Greenhouse as the structured hiring alternative to legacy ATS platforms
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse enterprise push continues; our native HCM integration and unified platform story remains key differentiator

competitorNews.title: SmartRecruiters March 2026 Release: Winston Match Updates and SmartSandbox
bullets: Winston Match updates give recruiters better control over AI-powered candidate matching with configurable weightings
Skills, Experience, and Education subscores now available for more granular AI matching decisions
SmartSandbox enhancements allow testing of workflows and offer approvals in isolated environments
Claims 300+ hours saved per recruiter annually and 2x higher candidate conversion with Winston Chat
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters AI matching subscores raise the bar; our HiredScore integration needs visible parity in skills matching UX

competitorNews.title: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026 Release Previews AI Copilot Joule for Recruiting
bullets: 1H 2026 release previews 13 April with production rollout 15-16 May, featuring role-aware AI copilot Joule
Joule agents cover performance, career development, people intelligence, HR service, and payroll with conversational interaction
Talent Intelligence Hub provides AI-powered skills analysis, capability gap identification, and internal talent recommendations
Embedded AI capabilities include skills matching, compensation analysis, and performance insights with mandatory human review
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SAP Joule copilot expansion mirrors Workday Illuminate trajectory; talent intelligence hub is a direct competitive threat

competitorNews.title: Oracle Fusion Cloud Recruiting 26B: Activity Centres and Career Coach
bullets: Sourcing Activity Centre and Candidate Follow-Up Tasks provide recruiters with centralised action-oriented dashboards
Career Coach and Smart Search for Jobs improve candidate self-service experience on career sites
Redwood Experience updates continue Oracle's modern UI push for interview management
Skill Suggestions on job requisitions leverage AI to recommend relevant skills from job descriptions
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Oracle recruiter dashboards and AI skill suggestions close UX gap; our Sana shell modernisation must accelerate
